name: Tree of Liberty
description: Jefferson's most incendiary line, printed full-width across the chest on a garment-dyed heavyweight tee. The quote that reminds every generation what freedom actually costs.
quote: The tree of liberty must be refreshed from time to time with the blood of patriots and tyrants. It is its natural manure.

name: Give Me Liberty
description: Patrick Henry's war cry that lit the fuse of the American Revolution. Bold, unmistakable, and as urgent now as it was in 1775.
quote: Give me liberty, or give me death!

name: Times That Try Men's Souls
description: Thomas Paine wrote these words to a freezing, retreating army. They rallied a revolution. A full-quote vintage tee for those who don't quit when it gets hard.
quote: These are the times that try men's souls. The summer soldier and the sunshine patriot will, in this crisis, shrink from the service of their country; but he that stands it now, deserves the love and thanks of man and woman.

name: Take America Back
description: The flagship. Military stencil lettering with an intentional distressed finish via DTF printing on a garment-dyed blank. This is the movement, worn on your chest.
quote: Take America Back

name: Sons of Liberty
description: The original American resistance movement. Pigment-dyed heavyweight hoodie with the Sons of Liberty banner and founding date. Broken-in from the first wear.
quote: No taxation without representation.

name: Liberty Over Safety
description: Franklin's warning about trading freedom for the illusion of security. A full-quote tee for anyone who's watched liberty erode in the name of "safety."
quote: Those who would give up essential Liberty, to purchase a little temporary Safety, deserve neither Liberty nor Safety.

name: Don't Tread On Me
description: Premium vintage trucker cap with structured crown. The Gadsden snake embroidered in flat 2D thread — the oldest symbol of American defiance. Snap-back closure.
quote: Don't Tread On Me

name: Liberty Once Lost
description: John Adams understood that freedom, once surrendered, rarely returns. A sobering full-quote tee for those paying attention.
quote: Liberty, once lost, is lost forever.

name: Almighty God Hath Created The Mind Free
description: 15oz ceramic mug carrying Jefferson's conviction that freedom of the mind is a God-given right. For the morning patriot.
quote: Almighty God hath created the mind free.

name: The Price of Liberty
description: Long sleeve garment-dyed shirt with the eternal warning: freedom demands vigilance. Softens with every wash.
quote: The condition upon which God hath given liberty to man is eternal vigilance.

name: Don't Tread On Me (Sticker)
description: Pack of 5 die-cut vinyl Gadsden flag stickers. Weatherproof and fade-resistant. For your truck, laptop, or anywhere you want to make a stand.
quote: Don't Tread On Me

name: Liberty Is the Great Parent
description: Washington understood that free thought and free speech are the root of everything a free nation grows. A bold-quote tee for defenders of the first freedom.
quote: Liberty, when it begins to take root, is a plant of rapid growth.

name: Freedom of Speech
description: Franklin's defense of the first freedom — the one that protects all others. A full-quote tee for a moment when speech itself is under siege.
quote: Whoever would overthrow the liberty of a nation must begin by subduing the freeness of speech.

name: Where Liberty Dwells
description: Franklin declared his allegiance not to a place, but to freedom itself. A vintage tee for citizens of liberty everywhere.
quote: Where liberty dwells, there is my country.

name: Freedom Hoodie
description: Pigment-dyed hoodie carrying Jefferson's timeless line on the price of freedom. Heavyweight, broken-in, built to last.
quote: Timid men prefer the calm of despotism to the tempestuous sea of liberty.

name: Land of the Free Hat
description: Structured vintage cap with "LAND OF THE FREE" embroidered in classic flat thread. Understated, timeless, American.
quote: Land of the Free

name: Resistance to Tyranny
description: Jefferson's creed, and the founding principle of the republic. A full-quote tee for those who refuse to comply with injustice.
quote: Resistance to tyrants is obedience to God.

name: When Injustice Becomes Law
description: The rallying cry of every resistance movement. Bold full-quote tee on a garment-dyed blank.
quote: When injustice becomes law, resistance becomes duty.

name: Rebellion to Tyrants
description: Franklin proposed this as the motto of the United States itself. A full-quote tee reclaiming the founders' rebellious spirit.
quote: Rebellion to tyrants is obedience to God.

name: Resistance Is Duty (Mug)
description: 15oz ceramic mug. Franklin's principle for the morning patriot. Dishwasher safe.
quote: Resistance to tyranny is obedience to God.

name: We The People
description: The three words that begin the whole experiment. Garment-dyed heavyweight tee with soft-hand DTG that looks like it's been in your closet for 200 years.
quote: We The People of the United States, in Order to form a more perfect Union...

name: Constitution Is My Guide
description: Washington's pledge on a pigment-dyed hoodie. For the patriot who puts the founding document above any politician.
quote: The Constitution is the guide which I never will abandon.

name: Facts Are Stubborn Things
description: Long sleeve garment-dyed shirt with John Adams' defense of truth. For the patriot who refuses to bend to the narrative.
quote: Facts are stubborn things; and whatever may be our wishes, our inclinations, or the dictates of our passions, they cannot alter the state of facts and evidence.

name: Tree of Liberty (Hoodie)
description: Jefferson's warning on a pigment-dyed heavyweight hoodie. For the patriot who understands freedom has a cost.
quote: The tree of liberty must be refreshed from time to time with the blood of patriots and tyrants.

name: Liberty Over Safety (Sticker)
description: Pack of 5 die-cut vinyl bumper stickers. Franklin's eternal warning, weatherproof and ready for your truck or laptop.
quote: Those who would give up essential Liberty, to purchase a little temporary Safety, deserve neither Liberty nor Safety.

name: Don't Tread On Me Beanie
description: Cuffed knit beanie with the Gadsden snake embroidered on the fold. Warm, structured, and unmistakably defiant.
quote: Don't Tread On Me

name: 1776 Liberty Beanie
description: Cuffed knit beanie with "1776" embroidered in classic flat thread. Understated, timeless, American.

name: We The People Crewneck
description: Heavyweight pigment-dyed crewneck sweatshirt. The Preamble across the chest in vintage serif. Soft, broken-in, built to last.
quote: We The People of the United States, in Order to form a more perfect Union...

name: Liberty Canvas Tote
description: Heavyweight natural canvas tote. "WHERE LIBERTY DWELLS, THERE IS MY COUNTRY" printed across the front. For the market, the library, or the protest.
quote: Where liberty dwells, there is my country.

name: Give Me Liberty Tumbler
description: 20oz stainless steel insulated tumbler. Patrick Henry's war cry wrapped around it. Keeps coffee hot and convictions hotter.
quote: Give me liberty, or give me death!

name: Don't Tread On Me Socks
description: All-over-print crew socks with the Gadsden snake and stripes. A little defiance from the ankle down.
quote: Don't Tread On Me

name: Take America Back Yard Sign
description: Weatherproof double-sided yard sign with H-stake. Plant your convictions in your front lawn.
quote: Take America Back

name: Gadsden Enamel Pin
description: Hard enamel lapel pin of the coiled Gadsden snake. Rubber clutch backing. For your jacket, bag, or hat.
quote: Don't Tread On Me
